sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ المَنْسَفُ الأَكْلَةَ الوَطَنِيَّةَ فِي الأُرْدُنِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf se smatra nacionalnim jelom u Jordanu.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is considered the national dish in Jordan.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ مِنَ الأَرُزِّ وَاللَّحْمِ وَاللَّبَنِ الجَمِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se sastoji od riže, mesa i jameeda (sušeni jogurt).
sentences.translationEn: This dish consists of rice, meat, and jameed (dried yogurt).

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ العَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ المَنْسَفِ فِي المُنَاسَبَاتِ السَّعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se okuplja oko velikog stola kako bi jela mansaf u sretnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers around a large table to eat Mansaf on happy occasions.

sentences.arabic: يُوضَعُ الخُبْزُ الرَّقِيقُ تَحْتَ الأَرُزِّ، وَيُزَيَّنُ الطَّبَقُ بِاللَّوْزِ وَالصَّنَوْبَرِ.
sentences.translation: Tanki hljeb se stavlja ispod riže, a jelo se ukrašava bademima i pinjolima.
sentences.translationEn: Thin bread is placed under the rice, and the dish is decorated with almonds and pine nuts.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ طَعَامٌ لَذِيذٌ جِدًّا وَيُحِبُّهُ الجَمِيعُ.
sentences.translation: To je veoma ukusna hrana koju svi vole.
sentences.translationEn: It is very delicious food and everyone loves it.
